_meta.keyKnowledge: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' music to inform our choices as composers and performers.

_source.w: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' music to inform our choices as composers and performers.
y: Rigorous critical analysis is essential for continued growth as both performers and composers.
Evaluating music from multiple perspectives — performer, composer, listener — deepens our understanding.
Documenting our analytical thinking demonstrates the intellectual depth of our musical engagement.
eg: We write detailed analytical essays on musical works using appropriate theoretical frameworks.
We evaluate our own compositions and performances against artistic intentions and musical standards.
We analyse how composers from different traditions achieve specific effects through their musical choices.
We compare and evaluate contrasting interpretations of the same musical work.
We maintain comprehensive documentation of our musical thinking, practice and development.
We engage in structured peer critique of compositions and performances.
